meaning: n.后面,背后,后方,屁股adj.后面的,背面的,后方的vt.培养,饲养,举起,树立,栽种vi.高耸,暴跳,用后腿站起
examples: I got a ding in my rear fender.
Her car crashed into the rear of a van.
A high gate blocks the only entrance to the rear.
The V8 charges up a 24kWh battery pack, situated between the rear frame rails.
My A2B Hybrid 24 looked cool, despite the lithium battery pack hanging above its rear wheel.
